title: anthyllis montana f. hispanica
intro: Anthyllis montana f. hispanica, also known as Spanish kidney vetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anthyllis montana f. hispanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
